name: product-selector-grid
description: Centered product selection surface with branded cards, background image shell, and responsive single-column collapse on mobile.
layout_rules: Center the landing card within a full-bleed shell that can take a background image.
Use a three-card grid on desktop, two-up on medium screens, and one-up on mobile.
Cards should stay square or near-square and align content to the top-left.
Use stronger title hierarchy in the card header and lighter supporting text within each product tile.
